fields.name: System Design
fields.description: Scalable architectures, distributed systems, load balancing, microservices, and production-ready system design patterns.

fields.name: Backend Engineering
fields.description: Django, REST APIs, authentication, caching with Redis, Celery task queues, and production backend best practices.

fields.name: DSA
fields.description: Data structures and algorithms — arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and interview preparation.

fields.name: AI / ML
fields.description: Machine learning concepts, model training, neural networks, and practical AI implementations in Python.

fields.name: Generative AI
fields.description: LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG systems, agentic AI workflows, and building with GPT-4 and open-source models.

fields.name: Python
fields.description: Python tips, advanced patterns, performance optimization, decorators, generators, and clean code practices.

fields.name: Databases
fields.description: PostgreSQL, indexing strategies, query optimization, Redis, MongoDB, and database design for high traffic systems.

fields.name: Automation
fields.description: n8n workflows, task automation, CI/CD pipelines, scripting, and building automated systems.
